files.index.js: const isNumber = require('is-number'); module.exports = (value) => isNumber(value) && Math.abs(value % 2) === 1;

const http = require('http'); module.exports = function fastify() { const routes = []; const server = http.createServer(async (req, res) => { const pathname = new URL(req.url, 'http://localhost').pathname; const route = routes.find((entry) => entry.method === req.method && entry.path === pathname); let sent = false; const reply = { statusCode: 200, headers: {}, code(value) { this.statusCode = value; return this; }, header(name, value) { this.headers[String(name).toLowerCase()] = String(value); return this; }, type(value) { return this.header('content-type', value); }, send(value) { if (sent) return this; sent = true; if (!this.headers['content-type'] && typeof value === 'object') this.headers['content-type'] = 'application/json'; res.writeHead(this.statusCode, this.headers); res.end(typeof value === 'string' ? value : JSON.stringify(value)); return this; } }; if (!route) { reply.code(404).send('Not Found'); return; } try { const result = await route.handler({ method: req.method, url: req.url, headers: req.headers, raw: req }, reply); if (result !== undefined && !sent) reply.send(result); } catch (error) { reply.code(500).send(error && error.message ? error.message : String(error)); } }); return { server, get(path, handler) { routes.push({ method: 'GET', path, handler }); return this; }, listen(options, callback) { const port = typeof options === 'object' ? options.port : options; server.listen(port, callback); return server; } }; };

class Hono { constructor() { this.routes = []; } get(path, handler) { this.routes.push({ method: 'GET', path, handler }); return this; } async fetch(request) { const url = new URL(request.url); const route = this.routes.find((entry) => entry.method === request.method && entry.path === url.pathname); if (!route) return new Response('Not Found', { status: 404 }); const context = { req: { path: url.pathname, url: request.url }, text(body, status = 200, headers = {}) { return new Response(String(body), { status, headers: { 'content-type': 'text/plain', ...headers } }); }, json(value, status = 200, headers = {}) { return new Response(JSON.stringify(value), { status, headers: { 'content-type': 'application/json', ...headers } }); } }; return route.handler(context); } } module.exports = { Hono };

const { EventEmitter } = require('events'); class Server extends EventEmitter { constructor(server) { super(); server.on('upgrade', (req, endpoint) => { const pathname = new URL(req.url, 'http://localhost').pathname; if (!pathname.startsWith('/socket.io/')) return; const socket = new Socket(endpoint); this.emit('connection', socket); }); } } class Socket extends EventEmitter { constructor(endpoint) { super(); this.endpoint = endpoint; this.ready = false; this.queue = []; this.id = Math.random().toString(36).slice(2) + 'AAAB'; endpoint.addEventListener('open', () => { this.ready = true; this.flush(); }); endpoint.addEventListener('message', (event) => { try { const packet = JSON.parse(event.data); EventEmitter.prototype.emit.call(this, packet.event, ...(packet.args || [])); } catch { EventEmitter.prototype.emit.call(this, 'message', event.data); } }); endpoint.addEventListener('close', () => EventEmitter.prototype.emit.call(this, 'disconnect')); this.sendPacket('connect', { id: this.id }); } flush() { while (this.queue.length) this.endpoint.send(this.queue.shift()); } sendPacket(event, ...args) { const data = JSON.stringify({ event, args }); if (!this.ready) this.queue.push(data); else this.endpoint.send(data); } emit(event, ...args) { if (event === 'newListener' || event === 'removeListener' || event === 'error') return EventEmitter.prototype.emit.call(this, event, ...args); this.sendPacket(event, ...args); return true; } } module.exports = { Server };

const { EventEmitter } = require('events'); class WebSocketServer extends EventEmitter { constructor({ server, path = '/' }) { super(); this.path = path; server.on('upgrade', (req, endpoint) => { const pathname = new URL(req.url, 'http://localhost').pathname; if (pathname !== this.path) return; this.emit('connection', new Socket(endpoint), req); }); } } class Socket extends EventEmitter { constructor(endpoint) { super(); this.endpoint = endpoint; this.ready = false; this.queue = []; endpoint.addEventListener('open', () => { this.ready = true; while (this.queue.length) this.endpoint.send(this.queue.shift()); this.emit('open'); }); endpoint.addEventListener('message', (event) => this.emit('message', event.data)); endpoint.addEventListener('close', () => this.emit('close')); } send(data) { if (!this.ready) { this.queue.push(data); return; } this.endpoint.send(data); } close(code, reason) { this.endpoint.close(code, reason); } } module.exports = { WebSocketServer, WebSocket: Socket };

JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(configPath, 'utf8')) : {}; const rootDir = config.compilerOptions?.rootDir || 'src'; const outDir = config.compilerOptions?.outDir || 'dist'; fs.mkdirSync(outDir, { recursive: true }); const input = path.join(rootDir, 'cli.ts'); const output = path.join(outDir, 'cli.js'); let source = fs.readFileSync(input, 'utf8'); source = source.replace(/: *[A-Za-z_$][\w$]*(?:\[\])?/g, ''); source = source.replace(/export +/g, ''); fs.writeFileSync(output, source); console.log('tsc fixture emitted ' + output);
